## Process Agent Shortcuts (AI-ADLC Generated)

The following shortcut invokes the AI-ADLC governance agent. Type the shortcut anywhere in a chat prompt — the corresponding agent activates immediately. No further clarification needed.

**How it works:** The shortcut is a direct command. When the AI sees it in your prompt, it loads the corresponding agent from `.kiro/agents/` and executes its full check pass.

### Active Shortcuts

| Shortcut | Agent | When to Call | Tier |
|----------|-------|-------------|:----:|
| `ADA__` | `architecture-decision-agent` — Architecture Decision Assessment | After AP completion, before AI-DWG handoff | 1 |

### Shortcut Rules

1. **`ADA__` triggers Architecture Decision Assessment.** When the user types `ADA__` anywhere in a prompt, invoke `.kiro/agents/architecture-decision-agent.md` and execute its full check pass. No clarification needed — treat `ADA__` as a direct command to run the agent.

### When to Call

Call `ADA__` at these process milestones:

| Milestone | Why |
|-----------|-----|
| After Stage 13 (Package Assembly) | Validates the complete AP before handoff |
| After DECISIONS phase (Stage 8) | Mid-workflow checkpoint for complex architectures |
| Before development team onboarding | Ensures architecture package meets quality bar |
| Before AI-DWG handoff | Confirms `adlc-state.md` and artifacts are AI-DWG-ready |

### What Happens If You Don't Call It

The AP may contain:
- Missing ADRs (undocumented technology decisions — rationale lost)
- C4 level misalignment (components referencing non-existent containers)
- Broken cross-references (documents pointing to non-existent artifacts)
- Incomplete state file (AI-DWG generates partial/incorrect steering)
- Extension rule violations (activated patterns not enforced in design)

The workspace integrity agent (AI-DWG) will eventually detect downstream inconsistencies, but by then the development team may have started building on flawed architecture.

### Quick Guide

For full documentation on the architecture quality checks, what happens if you skip, and how to recover, see:

> **`.governance/AGENT-GUIDE.md`** — the combined process agent user manual (AI-ADLC section).
